items.item: each EA runs its own DRL model (per-EA distributed agents)
items.paper_expected: each EA n runs a DRL model; multi-agent scheme where each EA acts as a DRL agent
items.repo_design: one DDQNTrainer (online+target+optimizer+replay) per EA; N=20 agents
items.evidence: OCR lines 138, 401, 405: 'each EA runs a DRL model'; 'each EA acts as a DRL agent'

items.paper_expected: Q-model parameters theta_n of DRL agent n (Table 2 symbols)
items.repo_design: separate online network weights per agent
items.evidence: OCR Table 2: theta_n = Q-model parameters of DRL agent n

items.paper_expected: Target Q-model parameters theta_hat_n per agent; copied every N_copy
items.repo_design: separate target network per agent; episode-based sync per agent
items.evidence: OCR line 587 + Table 2: target theta_hat_n; 'every N_copy training episodes'

items.item: Algorithm 1 is single-agent training, replicated per EA
items.paper_expected: Algorithm 1 trains a single-agent model in EA n; deployed per EA
items.repo_design: the validated single-agent DDQN update is instantiated independently per agent
items.evidence: OCR line 587: 'pseudocode for training a single-agent model'; line 591 'in EA n'

items.item: agents do not share decisions / autonomy
items.paper_expected: each agent does not require knowledge of other agents' decisions
items.repo_design: agents select independently from their own networks; only env state is shared
items.evidence: OCR lines 99, 109: 'each HOODIE agent does not require knowledge on the decisions made by other agents'

items.paper_expected: experience tuples stored in replay memory of size N_R; per-agent in Algorithm 1 (EA n)
items.evidence: OCR line 587/Table 4: N_R=10000; Algorithm 1 framed per EA n

items.paper_expected: not explicitly stated; per-agent models imply per-agent optimization
items.evidence: Table 4 lists Adam/lr; per-agent optimizer inferred from per-agent models

items.paper_expected: inference deploys distributed Q-models at each EA site
items.repo_design: greedy action routed to the owning EA's network; reconciliation evaluator reused with a shared decision-time state encoding (documented approximation)
items.evidence: OCR line 694: 'deploying distributed HOODIE models (only the Q-models) at each of the N EA sites'
